t_ch: <size=28>请主公检阅！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Ready for inspection, my liege!</size>

t_ch: 这是我们的鬣狗斗士！闻鼓而进，闻锣而止，可谓是训练有素！
t_en: These are our Hyena Skirmishers! They follow orders to the letter, moving on the drums and stopping on the gongs. They're as well-trained as they come!

t_ch: 让我听到你们的声音！
t_en: Let's hear some noise!

t_ch: <size=28>主公威武——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>All hail my liege!</size>

t_ch: 这是我们的兀鹫猎手！百步之外，劲矢可贯穿甲胄！
t_en: These are our Vulture Hunters! Give them a bow, and they'll put an arrow through a suit of armor from a hundred paces away!

t_ch: 弓与箭都准备好了吗？
t_en: Are your weapons ready for battle?

t_ch: <size=28>随时伴身——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Always, my liege!</size>

t_ch: 这是我们的猛犸蛮兵！排山倒海，无坚不摧！
t_en: And here are the Mammoth Maulers! They're an unstoppable force of nature!

t_ch: 拿出气势来！
t_en: Show me what you've got!

t_ch: <size=28>不负使命——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>We shall not fail!</size>

t_ch: 很好！
t_en: Excellent!

t_ch: 这…这是咱们的，高科技部队！
t_en: And over here... we have our high-tech unit!

t_ch: 你来给大伙表演个节目！
t_en: Step up and give us a performance!

t_ch: 节、节目？！
t_en: P-Performance!?

t_ch: …长满香蕉的小岛，蕉蕉～睡蕉小猴的爱巢，蕉蕉～
t_en: An island full of bananas, nanas~ A lovely nest for Slumbernanas, nanas~

t_ch: 这是敌军的细作！快抓住它！
t_en: Wait, that's an enemy spy! Seize them!

t_ch: 这是何等的卑劣！竟然不按常理出牌！
t_en: How low can you get!? That's not how you're supposed to play!

t_ch: Aieeeeeee——缭乱•体操？！为何会有缭乱•体操？！
t_en: Aieeeeeee! Dazzling... Gymnast!? What's a Dazzling Gymnast doing here!?

t_ch: 在下乃是器械体操社社长、缭乱•体操一脉的正统传人，孑然一身，愿将御敌护身之术传授给这纷扰世道中需要之人——「缭乱•破」是也！
t_en: I'm the president of the Prop Gymnastics Club and the one and only heir to the Dazzling Gymnastics style. I travel this messy world alone, teaching anyone who needs a way to protect themselves. Name's Dazzling Rappa!

t_ch: …这就是幻造的英豪吗？
t_en: So this is what an imagenate hero looks like?

t_ch: 这几句话还挺符合人设。
t_en: Those lines do fit her personality.

t_ch: 虽然「缭乱•变身」被识破，但情报已然得手！
t_en: Though the "Dazzling Transformation" was seen through, I've already got the intel!

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#255}的球棒•元帅，告辞！
t_en: Catch you later, Ballbat Marshal of {TEXTJOIN#255}!

t_ch: 主公，别让她跑了！
t_en: Quick, my liege! Don't let her get away!

t_ch: 全军听令，立刻出击体育馆！
t_en: All units, on my command! To the gymnasium!

t_ch: 古话说的好，「所有伟大将领…全在于遵循兵法的规律与自然的法则。」主公愿意与诸位尘灵将领一统商讨治兵之策，我们{TEXTJOIN#255}必将所向无敌！
t_en: There's an old saying: "Great leaders win by following the rules of war and the laws of nature." If you're willing to sit down with our wispae generals to talk about strategies, my liege, {TEXTJOIN#255} will be invincible!

t_ch: 传令下去，诸将至大本营集合。
t_en: Send word to all. Everyone's to gather at the base camp.

t_ch: 构史七年，由{NICKNAME}亲自领军，率{TEXTJOIN#255}兵分五路进攻绘世学院体育馆
t_en: In the 7th year of the Fictitious History, {NICKNAME} personally leads {TEXTJOIN#255} in a massive five-pronged assault on the Graphia Academy gymnasium.

t_ch: 此次战役，虚构史称「体育馆之乱」
t_en: In Fictitious History, this battle is called the "Gymnasium War."

t_ch: 不好，体育馆中怎么一个人都没有，难道是他们已经转移了？
t_en: Wait, there's no one in the gym at all? Did they already move out?

t_ch: 不，这是能够变身器械的体操！
t_en: No... this is a form of gymnastics that can turn them into equipment!

t_ch: 据情报说，不少普通学生在加入器械体操社后，降低了被教师、同学察觉的几率，还大幅减少了校规、课程表对自己的行动限制——
t_en: My sources say many students who joined the Prop Gymnastics Club were less likely to be noticed by teachers and schoolmates. They were also more free from the restrictions of their school rules and class schedules...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#逃课}缭乱•金蝉脱壳{RUBY_E#}——对吧？那边的拖把！
t_en: It's the {RUBY_B#Skipping Class}Dazzling: Devious Metamorphosis{RUBY_E#}, isn't it? I see you there, mop!

t_ch: 哼哼，这也被你们发现了吗？
t_en: Hmph. You managed to find me, huh?

t_ch: 只有最为强大的体操社员才能背负「首席」之名，亮出真身吧！
t_en: Only the best of the best gymnasts can claim the title of "Chief." Show yourselves!

t_ch: 遭遇伏击，却能反客为主，不错。
t_en: You were ambushed and still managed to turn the tables. Impressive.

t_ch: 在下已经观察阁下很久了，不知为何…明明我们从未见过面，却有种熟悉的感觉！
t_en: I've had my eye on you for a while now. It's weird... I know we haven't met before, but I feel like I've known you forever!

t_ch: 你也有种明明很熟悉的陌生感。
t_en: I feel the same way, like you're a stranger I somehow already know.

t_ch: 如果不是在如此乱世，想必我们会是知心友人吧！
t_en: In any other world, I'm sure we would have been the best of friends.

t_ch: 你忘记了吗？当年我们在大学…
t_en: Don't you remember? Back in our college days...

t_ch: 在下每日逃课也顺利考上了大学吗？这…多半是阁下中了幻术吧。
t_en: Wait, I skipped class every day and still got into college? You must be under some kind of spell...

t_ch: 一方面，在下的直觉不断地告诉自己，球棒•元帅是值得托付信赖的友人。
t_en: Part of me tells me that Ballbat Marshal is a friend I can count on.

t_ch: 另一方面，如此残酷的乱世不允许在下拿大家的性命冒险！
t_en: But this world is just too dangerous for me to go around risking everyone else's lives on a hunch!

t_ch: 在下潜伏在{TEXTJOIN#255}阵中，正是为了全面观察阁下。
t_en: I only went undercover with {TEXTJOIN#255} so I could get a good look at you.

t_ch: 有结论了吗？
t_en: Well? What's your conclusion?

t_ch: 阁下长于大局战略和政治谋略，兼具才能与品德，简直就是理想的主公。然而……
t_en: You're a brilliant and insightful strategist. And you've got skills and virtues. You're basically the perfect leader. But...

t_ch: 若论兵法韬略，球棒•元帅恐怕还不够成熟。《银河体操帖》有云：「胜兵必骄，骄兵必败，败兵必哀，哀兵必胜。」阁下此前大胜，已成骄兵！而骄兵必败啊！
t_en: When it comes to actual battle tactics, you're still a bit green, Ballbat Marshal. Like it says in the Cosmic Gymnastics Scrolls: "A winning army becomes complacent, and that complacency leads to defeat. A losing army feels the sting, and that sting leads to victory." You've been winning so much you've gotten arrogant! And that's exactly why you're going to lose!

t_ch: 怎么还有属性克制？
t_en: There are counteracting types too?

t_ch: 你这兵法跟谁学的？
t_en: Where on earth did you learn these military tactics?

t_ch: 多说无益……
t_en: Talk is cheap...

t_ch: 「百闻不如一见，百见不如一战」——这是在下的体操之道！
t_en: "A picture speaks a thousand words. A fight is worth a thousand sights." That's the way I do things!

t_ch: 倘若阁下得胜，器械体操社愿与{TEXTJOIN#255}结盟，助阁下天下一统！倘若阁下战败，便召开退役发布会吧！
t_en: If you defeat me, the Prop Gymnastics Club will join {TEXTJOIN#255} and help you unite the world. But if you lose, you'd better start planning your retirement!

t_ch: 全军听令，做好战斗准备！
t_en: All units, on my mark! Prepare for battle!

t_ch: 无需多言！杀！杀！杀！
t_en: Enough talk! Kill! Kill! Kill!

t_ch: 构史七年，「体育馆之乱」最终以器械体操社的惨败告终
t_en: In the 7th year of the Fictitious History, the "Gymnasium War" came to a close with the Prop Gymnastics Club's total defeat.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}爽快地接受了器械体操社的投降，并与之结成了政治军事同盟
t_en: {NICKNAME} accepted the Prop Gymnastics Club's surrender and formed a new alliance with them.

t_ch: 你并没有真正与我们交手的打算。
t_en: You never actually planned on defeating us, did you?

t_ch: 在下…对争夺天下并无兴致，只要能保护社团内大家的安全，就再无奢求了。
t_en: I'm not really interested in taking over the world. All I want is to keep the members of my club safe.

t_ch: 放心吧，我也会保护好它们。
t_en: Rest assured, I'll make sure they stay safe as well.

t_ch: 或许我所处历史是虚假的，但是我们的情谊毫无疑问是真实的。
t_en: Maybe the history I'm a part of isn't real, but this friendship definitely is.

t_ch: 你的温柔正如我的朋友一样。
t_en: You're just as kind as a certain friend I know.

t_ch: 哈哈，无论是何种历史中的乱破都会「一心不乱，破邪显正」。
t_en: Haha! Whatever version of history it is, I will always stay true to this: "remain unmoved until evil has been purged and justice enacted."

t_ch: 在下自然是能信得过阁下的。不过{TEXTJOIN#255}的崛起，势必会引起其他社团的关注，他们可能会将{TEXTJOIN#255}视为头号大敌，千万小心。
t_en: I know I can trust you. But the rise of {TEXTJOIN#255} won't go unnoticed. Other clubs will soon see you as their biggest threat, so stay on your guard.

t_ch: <size=28>报——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Report!</size>

t_ch: 准报。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 禀报主公大人，「田径社」派来外交使节，求见主公和首席大人。
t_en: My liege! The Track and Field Club has sent a messenger. They're asking to see you and the Chief.

t_ch: 说什么来什么。
t_en: Speak of the devil.

t_ch: 让使者来见我。
t_en: Send them in.

t_ch: 恭贺{NICKNAME}殿下班师得胜，体育馆之捷，已震动天下。可惜猛虎搏兔，力竭之时，亦被雄鹰眈视——恕我直言，您已成为了众矢之的。
t_en: My congratulations to you, {NICKNAME}, on your grand victory. The news from the gymnasium has already reached every corner of the world. However, even the mightiest tiger is vulnerable when exhausted after a hunt. And right now, you've made yourself a target for everyone.

t_ch: 有话直说！
t_en: Get to the point!

t_ch: 我们主公不忍见{NICKNAME}殿下基业倾覆，特遣在下前来，为殿下指点一条生路——若殿下愿意投诚，我主必以诸侯之礼相待。
t_en: Our liege doesn't wish to see everything you've built crumble, {NICKNAME}. That's why he sent me to offer you a way out. If you surrender now, our liege will treat you with all the respect due to a noble.

t_ch: 有意思，让我考虑一下再投降。
t_en: That's an interesting offer. Let me think about it before I surrender.

t_ch: 望殿下莫要做那螳臂当车的愚者。告辞～
t_en: I hope you aren't foolish enough to try and stop the inevitable. Until we meet again.

t_ch: 滚回去，让他洗干净脖子等我。
t_en: Get out. Tell your master to prepare himself. I'm coming for him.

t_ch: 竟然比我的主公还要更加狂妄……
t_en: Wow, you're even more arrogant than our liege...

t_ch: 把这个多嘴的尘灵拖下去斩了！
t_en: Drag this annoying wispae out! Off with its head!

t_ch: 不可，万万不可啊！两军交战不斩来使啊！
t_en: Hey, wait! You can't do that! You're not supposed to kill the messenger!

t_ch: …主公，眼下我们先回到大本营，再从长计议吧。
t_en: ...My liege, perhaps we should return to the base and discuss our next move in private.

t_ch: 全军听令，回大本营待命！
t_en: All units, fall back to the base camp and await further instructions!

t_ch: 「体育馆之乱」后，我军兵种有所补强，必将活用于下次战争。关于「田径社」，我收集了些情报，主公有什么想知道的吗？
t_en: We've bolstered our forces since the "Gymnasium War," which will be a huge help in our next campaign. I've gathered some intel on the Track and Field Club. What would you like to know, my liege?

t_ch: 说说那位「独眼龙」吧。
t_en: Tell me more about this "Lone-Eye Dragon."

t_ch: 作为绘世学院老师，他不仅勇武、更擅长合纵连横与计谋。因其狂放不羁、谈吐华丽的风格，也吸引了一大堆拥趸。
t_en: He's a teacher at the Graphia Academy, and he's as cunning as he is brave. He has a very flamboyant, theatrical way of speaking that's earned him quite a following.

t_ch: 至于「独眼龙」如此霸气的绰号——一方面，是因为他左眼失明；另一面，是因为他非常非常喜欢龙，这个称号似乎代表着…角色爱。
t_en: The moniker "Lone-Eye Dragon" sounds fierce, doesn't it? It's partly because he's blind in his left eye, and partly because he's absolutely obsessed with dragons. So the name is simply... expressing how much he loves them.

t_ch: 您能理解吗？
t_en: Does that make sense?

t_ch: 非常理解。
t_en: Perfectly.

t_ch: 不能理解。
t_en: Not at all.

t_ch: 主公倒也不必理解。
t_en: Indeed, there is no need for you to understand, my liege.

t_ch: 说说那个「田径社」吧。
t_en: Tell me more about the Track and Field Club.

t_ch: 「田径社」是全校第一大运动社团，他们据守着教学楼天台，居高临下，易守难攻。
t_en: The Track and Field Club is the biggest sports club in the Academy. They've taken over the rooftop of the main building. It's high up, so it's practically impregnable.

t_ch: 不过…说到天台上的田径运动，我毫无印象。不知您会想到什么？
t_en: I don't know of any track and field activities that are done on the rooftop. Do you have any ideas?

t_ch: 撑杆跳高？
t_en: Pole-vaulting?

t_ch: 还请注意安全第一。
t_en: Remember, safety first.

t_ch: 证券交易？
t_en: Stock exchange?

t_ch: 这跟天台有关，跟田径无关。
t_en: That fits the "rooftop" part, but has nothing to do with track and field.

t_ch: 说说如今的外交形势吧。
t_en: Tell me about the current situation on the diplomatic front.

t_ch: 「田径社」宣布了禁止龙产品出口，而「回家社」则宣布了「可食用红土」出口管制…双方正处在某种互市冲突之中——可怕的是，他们根本就没有贸易往来。
t_en: The Track and Field Club has announced a ban on dragon-related product exports, while the Go-Home Club has declared export restrictions on "edible redsoil"... Both sides are locked in some kind of trade conflict. And the terrifying part is, they don't even have any trade relations to begin with.

t_ch: 我们也去出口管制吧！
t_en: We should start controlling exports too!

t_ch: 这到底对谁有好处啊！
t_en: Who exactly is supposed to benefit from this?

t_ch: 「真理社」没有消息，我会持续打听。
t_en: Still nothing from the Truth Society. I'll let you know if I hear anything.

t_ch: 修复画作的进度怎样了？
t_en: How's the progress on the restoration of the artwork?

t_ch: 这一战我们回收了不少的古老颜料，还请您再接再厉。
t_en: We retrieved a good amount of old paint from that battle. Let's keep that momentum going.

t_ch: …仅凭绘世一幅过去的画作，就能复现出烬土纪元？这超出了我对幻造艺术的研究认知——艺术，究竟还有多少未解之谜呢？
t_en: Just one of Graphia's old paintings can actually recreate the Cindearth Age. That's way beyond what I know about imagenate art. Just how many more secrets are tucked away in these paintings?

t_ch: 另外，这是我的直觉——请主公千万留意「说书人」诓二，它…非同一般。
t_en: Oh, another thing. This is just a hunch, but you should be wary around Fibbs the Storyteller, my liege. They are... more than meets the eye.

t_ch: 我明白了。
t_en: I understand.

t_ch: 攻打天台的奇策，我已经有想法了。下次出征时，我再详细解释。
t_en: I've already thought of a strategy for us to attack that rooftop. I'll elaborate the next time we head out.

t_ch: 此处地势险要，道路仅此一条，「田径社」又派驻了士兵镇守门关。
t_en: This spot is a tactical nightmare. There's only one path, and the Track and Field Club has already set up guards at the gate.

t_ch: 「田径社」天台号称「牢不可破」——想要强行突破，必然付出极大的代价。
t_en: They say the Track and Field Club's rooftop is "impenetrable." A forceful assault would cost us dearly.

t_ch: 我早已准备好了计策，为此需要做到两件事——
t_en: I've already got a plan. We just need to do two things.

t_ch: 一是「佯攻」：我与诓二阁下举兵佯攻「回家社」，让「田径社」相信{TEXTJOIN#255}的主力部队不在天台。
t_en: First, a feint. Fibbs and I will lead an attack on the Go-Home Club. That'll make the Track and Field Club believe that {TEXTJOIN#255}'s main forces are not on the rooftop.

t_ch: 二是「伪装」：主公和缭乱•破阁下伪装成流匪，通过隘口里应外合。
t_en: Second, a disguise. You and Dazzling Rappa will dress up like bandits to get past the checkpoint, and then we'll hit them from both fronts!

t_ch: 我明白了，要用「缭乱•变身」。
t_en: I see. Time for a "Dazzling Transformation."

t_ch: 伪装奇袭，真是大胆的策略。
t_en: An infiltration with disguises? That's a bold strategy.

t_ch: 这…确实是妙计啊。
t_en: Now that... is what I call a "plan"!

t_ch: 那就依计行事，祝各位旗开得胜！
t_en: Let's get to it, then. Good luck, everyone!

t_ch: 构史八年，{NICKNAME}率领精锐部队，绕行教学楼一圈后，前往「田径社」天台
t_en: In the 8th year of the Fictitious History, {NICKNAME} led an elite team, took a detour around the academic building, and headed to the Track and Field Club's rooftop.

t_ch: 将士们脱下铠甲，换上流匪的装扮，掩盖军事意图，并以做生意为借口接近哨所
t_en: The soldiers ditched their armor for bandit clothes to hide their plan, and headed toward the outpost, pretending to be looking for a business deal.

t_ch: 此次战役，虚构史称「天台围城战」
t_en: In Fictitious History, this battle is called the "Rooftop Siege."

t_ch: 站住！你们是什么人？这里是「田径社」的领地，若无许可不得靠近！你是谁？
t_en: Stop right there! Who are you people? You're in Track and Field territory now. You are not permitted to be here, unless authorized. Identify yourselves!

t_ch: 情急之下，你将目光瞥向一侧的《苍天航路绒绒号》，它给你带来了一闪的灵光。
t_en: Anxious, you noticed a copy of Fluffy Across the Blue from the corner of your eye. It gave you a spark of inspiration.

t_ch: 我叫…舟恒！这位是我的伙伴，三月…初八。
t_en: My name is... Done Heng! And this is my partner, March... 8th.

t_ch: 好怪的名字，都是没见过的生面孔呢……
t_en: I've never heard those names before, nor have I ever seen you around...

t_ch: 尘灵大哥，自己人。
t_en: Big bro Wispae. We're on your side.

t_ch: 自己人？你们的颜色怎么是黄色的？
t_en: On our side? Then why are you yellow?

t_ch: 这是防冷涂的蜡。
t_en: It's just some wax we put on to stay warm.

t_ch: 我奉命带货进城。
t_en: I'm just here to deliver a shipment.

t_ch: 现在都流行直播带货了，你这样带货不对吧？
t_en: Everyone's doing livestreaming now. You're still doing deliveries the old-fashioned way?

t_ch: 我们是传统手搓仙人，不懂你在说些什么。
t_en: We're traditionalists. We don't really get what you're talking about.

t_ch: 不是我为难你们，我们正在与「回家社」搞互市冲突，我们拒绝通商，回去吧！
t_en: It's not personal, but we're in the middle of a trade war with the Go-Home Club. No trading, period. So go home!

t_ch: 啧，失策了。
t_en: Tsk. Didn't see that coming.

t_ch: …我多嘴问一句，你们带了什么货来呢？
t_en: Hey, wait... what kind of "shipment" are we talking about?

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，如果「独眼龙」来自于你的记忆，他想要的是什么？）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, if "Lone-Eye Dragon" is based on your memories, what do you think he actually wants?)

t_ch: 我的项上人头？
t_en: My head on a platter?

t_ch: *压低嗓子*到底是什么好心人会去给敌方将领献头啊？！
t_en: *lowers voice* What kind of "good person" just marches up and hands their head to an enemy general on a silver platter!?

t_ch: 附赠小刀的绘世学院地图？
t_en: A map of Graphia Academy with a free pocket knife?

t_ch: 不需要，我们手机上也有在线地图的。
t_en: We don't need that. We've got online maps on our phones.

t_ch: …大地兽？
t_en: Dromases?

t_ch: 大地兽？！你是说…龙！
t_en: Dromases!? You mean... dragons!?

t_ch: 大地兽确实符合「互市豁免」政策，那意味着…你一定知道通关口令？速速报来！
t_en: Dromases are indeed exempt from the trade rules... so you must know the passphrase, right? Out with it!

t_ch: （糟糕，还有这一手？！你有任何想法吗？）
t_en: (Wait, there's a passphrase!? Any ideas?)

t_ch: 世界的真理，我已解明！
t_en: I have deciphered the truth of this world!

t_ch: 什么意思啊？
t_en: What does that mean?

t_ch: 没、没什么。
t_en: No, it's nothing.

t_ch: *狂妄地大笑*哈哈哈哈！
t_en: *laughs arrogantly* HAHAHAHA!

t_ch: 你在笑什么，这好笑吗？
t_en: What's so funny?

t_ch: 这并不好笑……
t_en: That's really not funny...

t_ch: 魔术技巧！
t_en: Watch this magic trick!

t_ch: 很遗憾，口令错误。
t_en: I'm afraid that's the wrong passphrase.

t_ch: 不过，我就破例给你们个提示吧！其实你已经几乎说对了，但就是缺少了点…精髓。
t_en: I'll make an exception and give you a hint. You're almost there... you just need a little more... flair.

t_ch: 魔↗术↘技↗巧！
t_en: Watch ↗ this ↘ magic ↗ trick ↘!

t_ch: 嗯嗯！对了对了！有那味了！你们过去吧！
t_en: That's it! You nailed the vibe! Go on through!

t_ch: （这伪装…希望能蒙混过关吧。）
t_en: (Let's hope... this disguise gets us through.)

t_ch: 哼，有两下子，竟然在没有士兵发出警报的情况下通过了关哨！
t_en: Hmph. Not bad. You managed to get past the guards without anyone raising the alarm!

t_ch: 既然你知道我的通关口令，说不定你早已认识我。毕竟…我也有相同的感觉——
t_en: If you know the passphrase, then maybe you already know who I am. Because... I feel like I know you, too.

t_ch: 我知道，你是阿那克萨戈拉斯…
t_en: I know who you are. Anaxagoras...

t_ch: 第一，别叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，别打断我——沉默是金，切记。
t_en: Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxagoras. Rule number two: Never interrupt me. Silence is golden.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，好久不见啊…
t_en: Long time no see, Professor Anaxa...

t_ch: 第一，别叫我那刻夏。第二，别打断我——沉默是金，切记。
t_en: Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: Never interrupt me. Silence is golden. Remember that.

t_ch: 我的名字没有那么长，叫我那霎即可。
t_en: My name's not that long. Anaksa will do.

t_ch: 你们很幸运，竟然在我的「龙骑兵战术」完成之前就攻进了城来。
t_en: You're lucky you made it in here before I could finish my Dromas Rider tactics.

t_ch: 什么情况，绘世学院还有大地兽？
t_en: What? There are actually dromases at Graphia Academy?

t_ch: 二相乐园的幻造种…无非都是愿力构成，原理比炼金更简单。
t_en: The imagenae here in Planarcadia... are just made from Wishpower. Its principles are easier than alchemy.

t_ch: 也就是说，只要聚集了足够多的愿力，我也能在这里创造大地兽！
t_en: Basically, if I can get enough Wishpower together, I can just make my own dromases right here!

t_ch: 龙骑兵战术？
t_en: Dromas Rider tactics?

t_ch: 铁炮骑兵，这也是烬土纪元的一个侧面。
t_en: The steel gun cavalry. That's also a thing from the Cindearth Age.

t_ch: 宁愿破坏二相乐园世界观也要幻造大地兽，这是何等的执念！
t_en: You're so obsessed that you'd actually break the world setting of Planarcadia just to make some dromases!?

t_ch: 独眼龙•那霎，快束手投降吧！
t_en: It's over, Lone-Eye Dragon Anaksa! Surrender now!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈——！
t_en: Hahahahahahaha!

t_ch: 我自诩为「大表演家」，算是略懂你们那虚张声势的演技。
t_en: As the Great Performer, I think I know a bluff when I see one.

t_ch: 诸位为了让我深信不疑，想必已将主力精兵，远调至他处布阵了。而此刻，站在我面前的，虽是勇猛非凡的壮士，但恐怕…也已是一支深入险境的孤军了！
t_en: You must have sent your main forces somewhere else, just to make me let my guard down. And now, standing before me, you may be valiant warriors... But, you're merely sitting ducks!

t_ch: 全军听令——
t_en: All units, on my command!

t_ch: 敌军已至阵前，纵使身陷重围，亦要杀出血路。
t_en: The enemy's right here! Even if we're surrounded, we will pave a bloodstained path to victory.

t_ch: <size=28>冲啊——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Chaaarge!</size>

t_ch: 全军听令，做好战斗准备！
t_en: All units, on my mark! Prepare for battle!

t_ch: 无需多言！杀！杀！杀！
t_en: Enough talk! Kill! Kill! Kill!

t_ch: 构史八年，「天台围城战」最终以「田径社」被彻底攻陷告终
t_en: In the 8th year of the Fictitious History, the "Rooftop Siege" came to a close with the Track and Field Club's crushing defeat.

t_ch: 至此{NICKNAME}吞并了「田径社」，加快了天下统一的进程
t_en: {NICKNAME} usurped the Track and Field Club, bringing the world one step closer to unification.

t_ch: …实在是场精彩的战斗。现在，你们要如何处置我？
t_en: That was an impressive battle. So, what are you going to do with me now?

t_ch: 我必须邀请你来做社团老师呀。
t_en: I'd like to invite you to be our club's teacher.

t_ch: 这还是挺出乎意料。
t_en: That was unexpected.

t_ch: 你懂的，我和那刻夏谁跟谁啊…
t_en: You know, Anaxa and I are tight...

t_ch: 第一，别叫我那刻夏。第二，你说的那人与我并非同一个人。
t_en: Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: I am not that person.

t_ch: 你的谋略，配得上这场胜利。你的器量，更是胜过了这场胜利。
t_en: Your tactics earned you this victory, but your character is even more impressive.

t_ch: 我很欣赏你，既然你邀请我，我也不再推辞。我，那霎，代表「田径社」接受与{TEXTJOIN#255}结盟。
t_en: I admire you. Since you've invited me, I won't say no. I, Anaksa, on behalf of the Track and Field Club, accept this alliance with {TEXTJOIN#255}.

t_ch: <size=28>愿追随主公！</size>
t_en: <size=28>We're with you, my liege!</size>

t_ch: 那霎大人，我的心中一直有个疑惑——「田径社」为什么选择天台作为大本营，而非更适合田径运动的操场？
t_en: Lord Anaksa, I've been meaning to ask... why did you choose the rooftop as your base camp? Wouldn't the sports field be a better place for track and field?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，你说的那是传统的田径社，好无趣。
t_en: Hahaha! You're talking about those traditional track and field clubs. How boring.

t_ch: 那您这是…？
t_en: Then what about you...?

t_ch: 我的「田径社」并不是「田径社团」的意思——它的全称是，「沧海桑田后，径直去看护及推广大地兽社」。
t_en: My "Track and Field" stands for: "Despite All Variables, Track Down and Care For All Dromases in the Fields."

t_ch: 你这缩写应该叫「大地兽社」。
t_en: You could've just called it "Dromas Club."

t_ch: 太过直白，少了些美感。
t_en: Way too literal. That lacks artistic flair!

t_ch: 我真是服了，你说这个谁懂啊！
t_en: Unbelievable. Who would ever get that!?

t_ch: 是吗？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 有了，你们看这大地兽头上长着对凶狠的角，不如以此为象征命名社团吧——
t_en: I've got a better idea! See those tough-looking horns on the dromas? Let's use that as our name!

t_ch: 就叫…「狠角社」如何？
t_en: What about... "Tough Horns Club"?

t_ch: …我们聊些其他的话题吧。
t_en: ...Let's talk about something else.

t_ch: <size=28>报——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Report!</size>

t_ch: 准报。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 禀报主公大人，管粮官命小人前来告命。大本营兵粮已然见底，仅余三日之粟。士兵们抱怨连天…此事关乎全军存续，恳请主公速速决断！
t_en: My liege, the quartermaster sent me! Our food supplies are almost gone, we only have three days' worth of rations left. The troops are starting to grumble... The fate of the army is at stake, my liege! I urge you for a swift solution!

t_ch: 主公，军心不可乱，速速去采购军饷吧！
t_en: My liege, we can't let morale drop. We must go and secure more supplies immediately!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你去食堂看看吧。别慌张，我这里还有些物资能够给你救急。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, head over to the cafeteria and check things out. No need to panic. I've got some supplies here that should tide you over.

t_ch: 没问题，我这就去食堂看看！
t_en: No problem, I'll head to the cafeteria right now!

t_ch: 太靠谱了，那刻夏老师——
t_en: So reliable! Professor Anaxa—

t_ch: 第一，你知道我要说什么，你走吧。
t_en: Number one, you know what I'm about to say, so just go.

t_ch: 偌大的学院食堂，竟然出现了米荒！你迅速扫视了一圈，除了残羹冷炙，只剩一位默不作声、库库干饭的不良少女——堂堂{TEXTJOIN#255}大军，竟然揭不开锅了！
t_en: The massive academy cafeteria has run out of rice! You quickly scan the area: aside from some leftover scraps, all that remains is a delinquent girl silently scarfing down her food. The mighty {TEXTJOIN#255} Army can't even afford a proper meal!

t_ch: 等等…那是什么？！最后的汉堡包！
t_en: Wait... What's that!? The last burger!

t_ch: 竟然还有一个野生的汉堡包？！感谢大自然的馈赠！
t_en: Wait, a wild burger here!? Thanks for the gift, Mother Nature!

t_ch: 住手，这可是我的汉堡包！
t_en: Hey, hands off! That's MY burger!

t_ch: {F#好姐姐}{M#好哥哥}你看我有三秒没吃饭了，可不可以…将它让给我呢？
t_en: Hey {F#good sister}{M#sweet brother}, I haven't eaten in like three whole seconds. Could you maybe... let me have that?

t_ch: 你不是云璃吗，在这干什么？
t_en: Yunli? What are you doing here?

t_ch: 干什么？当然是在干饭啊。爷爷说过了，「人间大事，干饭二字。」
t_en: What am I doing? Chowing down, obviously. Grandpa always said, "Life's all about one thing: eating."

t_ch: 一个汉堡包是救不了{TEXTJOIN#255}的。不如趁机卖她个人情，她可能真是饿了。
t_en: One burger isn't gonna save {TEXTJOIN#255}. Might as well do her a favor. She's probably starving.

t_ch: 拿去吧。
t_en: Here you go.

t_ch: 谢谢您～顺便一提，尘灵不需要糖和蛋白质补充体力，它们需要是「愿力」。
t_en: Thank you~ By the way, wispae don't need sugar or protein to recharge. What they run on is "Wishpower."

t_ch: 你恍然大悟，对啊！这才是二相乐园的世界观设定，所以…是有人故意谎报军情？
t_en: It suddenly occurs to you: Oh, right! That's how the world of Planarcadia is supposed to work, so... did someone deliberately give false intel?

t_ch: 我是回家社社长，「猎刀人」云璃儿。而你是…{NICKNAME}，我没说错吧？
t_en: I'm Lil' Yunli the "Bladehunter," President of the Go-Home Club. And you're... {NICKNAME}, right?

t_ch: 正是在下。
t_en: That's me.

t_ch: 今日休战！
t_en: Today is a temporary truce!

t_ch: 认错人了…
t_en: Wrong person...

t_ch: 看在这一饭之恩上，我希望回家社和{TEXTJOIN#255}之间能有场和谈！
t_en: As thanks for this meal, I hope there can be peace talks between the Go-Home Club and {TEXTJOIN#255}!

t_ch: …原来可以不用战争？！
t_en: ...Wait, you mean we didn't have to fight!?

t_ch: 和平不也是一种手段吗？
t_en: Isn't peace just another means to an end?

t_ch: 叮咚咚～♪同学们好，现在插播一段校园广播——
t_en: Ding-dong-dong~ ♪ Hey there, students! An intermission for the campus broadcast—

t_ch: 回家社的，云璃儿，云璃儿同学！
t_en: From the Go-Home Club, Lil' Yunli, Lil' Yunli!

t_ch: 你爷爷给你送来了两瓶好喝的热浮羊奶要给你。
t_en: Your grandpa sent over two bottles of delicious hot steamed puffergoat milk for you.

t_ch: 哇！你的爷爷好爱你哦！
t_en: Wow! Your grandpa does really love you!

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，我必须走了。拿着，这是谈和的邀请函。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, I have to go. Here, take this. It's an invitation to the peace talks.

t_ch: 如果你也有相同的意愿，请来回家社一叙。我请你吃好吃的，我们边吃边谈！现在就不多说了，说多了都是口水……
t_en: If you're interested, swing by the Go-Home Club! I'll treat you to something delicious, and we can chat over food! I'll keep it short for now. Say anymore, and I'll be drooling...

t_ch: 你注意到她在听到广播后，在同学们羡慕的目光中狂奔而出。
t_en: You notice her bolting out after hearing the broadcast, leaving her classmates staring after her in envy.

t_ch: （若是能和谈也是极好的，我也该回去了……）
t_en: (If we can settle this through talks, all the better. I should head back now...)

t_ch: 和谈？！这纷乱的天下竟然会有这样的事，难以置信。主公，那多半是陷阱啊！
t_en: Peace talks!? I can't believe such a thing could happen in this chaotic world. My liege, it's gotta be a trap!

t_ch: 云璃比较单纯，不会是陷阱。
t_en: Yunli's too straightforward. This isn't a trap.

t_ch: 就算是陷阱，我也毫无畏惧。
t_en: Even if it's a trap, I'm not afraid.

t_ch: 上兵伐谋，不战而胜，我支持。
t_en: The supreme art of war is to defeat our foes with strategy, instead of battle. I'm all for it.
...Tsk.

t_ch: 主公，做好准备后，我们就去向回家社赴宴吧！
t_en: My liege, once you're ready, let's head to the Go-Home Club for the banquet!

t_ch: 传令下去，诸将至大本营集合。
t_en: Send word to all. Everyone's to gather at the base camp.

t_ch: 很感谢你们的到来，{NICKNAME}，以及{TEXTJOIN#255}的使团们。
t_en: Thank you so much for coming, {NICKNAME}, and the envoys from {TEXTJOIN#255}.

t_ch: 我就开门见山了——我收到了线报，各位背叛了我的信任。
t_en: I'll get straight to the point. I received a report that you betrayed my trust.

t_ch: <size=28>报——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Report!</size>

t_ch: 和谈期间，{TEXTJOIN#255}军接连攻陷了我军在校园中庭、校长办公室等前哨站，我军…损失惨重。
t_en: During the peace talks, the forces of {TEXTJOIN#255} overran our outposts in the campus courtyard, the dean's office, and other positions... Our losses were devastating.

t_ch: 我没下这样的命令！
t_en: I never gave that order!

t_ch: 有内鬼，停止交易！
t_en: A mole. End the transaction now!

t_ch: （…难道是诓二叛变了？）
t_en: (...Wait, did Fibbs betray us?)

t_ch: （在和谈的紧要关头？这可不妙。）
t_en: (At such a critical moment in the peace talks? This is bad.)

t_ch: 我曾在这里进行「不要削挑战」，向那些恃强凌弱的学生发起挑战，若是我得胜，便赢取他们手中的武器——这便是我「猎刀人」之名的由来。
t_en: I used to hold "Blade Challenges" here, calling out those students who bullied the weak. If I won, I'd claim their weapons as my prize. That's how I earned the name "Bladehunter."

t_ch: 螺丝刀、卷笔刀、萝卜刀…我已经如此收集了九百九十九柄刀……
t_en: Screwy-driver, pencil sharpener, carrot knife... I've already collected <unbreak>999</unbreak> blades...

t_ch: <size=28>报——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Report!</size>

t_ch: 前线战报，图书室，音乐教室，食堂等未设防工事…也被敌军将领诓二占领。
t_en: Front-line reports. The library, music room, cafeteria, and other unfortified places, have been occupied by the enemy general Fibbs.

t_ch: 诓二…你陷我于不义！
t_en: Fibbs... you stabbed me in the back!

t_ch: 接下来，我将讨要第一千柄刀！
t_en: Next, I shall claim the <unbreak>1,000</unbreak>th blade!

t_ch: 等等…这其中必然是有误会的。
t_en: Wait... there must be some kind of misunderstanding here.

t_ch: 恐怕确实是有些误会吧，但无论那是什么，回家社遭遇背叛已是事实！
t_en: Maybe there really was some kind of misunderstanding, but whatever it was, the fact remains: the Go-Home Club was betrayed!

t_ch: 和平之约在背信弃义前，已是无稽之谈！
t_en: A peace treaty means nothing when faced with treachery!

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 即便如此，我也做不到在会谈中缚杀宾客的卑劣之事！请各位拿起武器，摆好阵型，堂堂正正与我方尘灵士兵决一死战！
t_en: Even so, I would never stoop to such vile treachery as slaying my guests during negotiations! Now pick up your weapons, form your formations, face my wispae soldiers, and fight to the death!

t_ch: <size=28>决一死战——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Fight to the death!</size>

t_ch: 我们必须回应她的决心，再让她冷静下来。
t_en: We need to match her resolve and help her calm down.

t_ch: 能否从你手中夺下我的第一千柄刀，就看这一战了！
t_en: Whether I can snatch my thousandth from you depends on this battle!

t_ch: 我的老铁早已饥渴难耐了！请——
t_en: My Old Mettle's been itching for action! Please—

t_ch: 全军听令，做好战斗准备！
t_en: All units, on my mark! Prepare for battle!

t_ch: 无需多言！杀！杀！杀！
t_en: Enough talk! Kill! Kill! Kill!

t_ch: 构史九年，回家社提出和谈请求，并邀请{TEXTJOIN#255}在绘世学院学校门口进行会面
t_en: In the ninth year of the Fictitious History, the Go-Home Club proposed peace talks and invited {TEXTJOIN#255} to meet at the entrance of Graphia Academy

t_ch: 和谈中途因诓二的反叛，演进成军事冲突，「回家社和谈」最终以回家社被攻陷而告终
t_en: The Go-Home Club peace talks escalated into armed conflict due to Fibbs' betrayal, ultimately ending with the Go-Home Club being ensnared

t_ch: 虚构史称「{TEXTJOIN#255}大本营之变」
t_en: In Fictitious History, it's called the "{TEXTJOIN#255} Base Camp Incident"

t_ch: …回家社的士兵们！放下武器吧，热爱和平的尘灵们继续争斗下去，只是两败俱伤。
t_en: ...Soldiers of the Go-Home Club! Lay down your weapons. We wispae are peace-loving. If we keep fighting, both sides will just end up losing.

t_ch: 全军听令，放下武器停止进攻。
t_en: All troops, stand down! Drop your weapons and cease your attack.

t_ch: 请告诉我诓二到哪去了！
t_en: Tell me where Fibbs went!

t_ch: <size=28>报——！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Report!</size>

t_ch: 准报。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 禀报主公大人，诓二为主公留下了一封简信——
t_en: My liege, Fibbs left a letter for you—

t_ch: 「烬土纪元，乃是最为混乱与残酷的时代。正因如此，才有了『英雄造时势，时势造英雄』的条件。」
t_en: "The Cindearth Age was the most chaotic and brutal era. That's exactly why it created the perfect conditions for 'heroes to shape the times, and times to forge heroes.'"

t_ch: 「而主公您实在是太强大、太有人格魅力了！无论是怎样的战场，都是轻松取胜，没有尔虞我诈，没有功败垂成…没有一点史诗感！」
t_en: "But you, my liege, are simply too powerful, too charismatic! No matter what battlefield you're on, you breeze through to victory, no scheming, no nail-biting finishes... There's no epic at all!"

t_ch: 「甚至…你还打算动用『谈和』的手段，连战争都没了！这还是烬土纪元吗！」
t_en: "You even plan on using 'peace talks' tactics. No more wars! Is this still the Cindearth Age!?"

t_ch: 我想要和平有什么不好？
t_en: What's wrong with wanting peace?

t_ch: 和谈也是历史的一部分！
t_en: Peace talks are part of history too!

t_ch: 「…我就猜你会这么说。」
t_en: "...I knew you'd say that."

t_ch: 「但这样和平的历史实在是太没有意思了！你这个…这个…和平主义者！」
t_en: "But a peaceful history like that is just so boring! You... you... pacifist!"

t_ch: 「{TEXTJOIN#255}已经无兵可用了，真理社会给绘世学院带来永恒的乱世！」
t_en: "{TEXTJOIN#255} has run out of troops. The Truth Society shall bring the eternal Age of Chaos to Graphia Academy!"

t_ch: 以上就是全部了。
t_en: That's everything.

t_ch: …如果我推理得没错，「说书人」诓二，是名企图将「乱世」刻印在历史名画之中的虚构史学家。
t_en: ...If my deduction is correct, Fibbs the Storyteller is a History Fictionologist attempting to inscribe the "Age of Chaos" into famous historical paintings.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Ahahaha.

t_ch: 如果这一切都是虚构史学家所为，都能说通了。可惜，这也揭露了另一个事实。
t_en: If the History Fictionologists were behind all of this, it would all make sense. Unfortunately, this also reveals another truth.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我等英豪皆为「虚构历史」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>We heroes are all part of "Fictitious History."</color>

t_ch: 诓二只需再度篡改虚构历史，我们可能…直接在「历史」中消失，无法帮助你。
t_en: If Fibbs distorts the Fictitious History again, we might... disappear straight from "history" itself and won't be able to help you.

t_ch: 但是——我们对你的熟悉与信任并不是虚构的。
t_en: But— Our familiarity with you and our trust in you are not made up.

t_ch: 正如我的大地兽不是虚构的。
t_en: Just like how my dromas is real.

t_ch: 带上我们的尘灵士兵去一统天下吧，阁下！
t_en: Take our wispae soldiers and conquer the world!

s_ch: 缭乱•破&独眼龙•那霎&云璃儿
s_en: Dazzling Rappa & Lone-Eye Dragon Anaksa & Lil' Yunli
t_ch: 历史，就交给你了。
t_en: History is in your hands now.

t_ch: 放心交给我吧！
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 至此我终于明白了——
t_en: And that's when I finally get it—

t_ch: 我为何会轻易地接受了乱世的设定，我又为何会轻易地信任诓二的讲述…这是因为，所谓真珠女士的学术型人偶也是「虚构历史」的设计。
t_en: Why did I so easily accept the premise of the Age of Chaos? Why did I so readily trust Fibbs' account...? It's because the academic puppets of the so-called Madam Pearl are themselves part of the "Fictitious History" design.

t_ch: …幸好我对诓二早有防范，主公回到大本营，会有密探向你汇报诓二的行踪。
t_en: ...Fortunately, I've been keeping tabs on Fibbs. Once you return to the base camp, my scouts will report on its whereabouts.

t_ch: 这最后一战，只能靠主公自己了。
t_en: This final battle... you'll have to handle it on your own, my liege.

t_ch: 谢谢你，你是我最好的军师！
t_en: Thank you, you're the best strategist I could ask for!

t_ch: 祝主公班师得胜！
t_en: May you return victorious, my liege!

t_ch: 虚构之中亦有真实，你们的情谊便足以为证。接下来，请准备好终结乱世的最后一战。
t_en: Even within fiction, there exists truth, and your bond is enough to prove it. Now then, steel yourselves for the final battle to end this Age of Chaos.

t_ch: 全军听令，准备决战。
t_en: All troops, prepare for the final battle.

t_ch: 主公大人，我是军师阁下留下的密探，我会带您找到诓二的行踪。
t_en: My liege, I'm an undercover agent left here by the strategist. I'll help you track down Fibbs.

t_ch: 传令下去，诸将至大本营集合。
t_en: Send word to all. Everyone's to gather at the base camp.

t_ch: 构史十年，{TEXTJOIN#255}的密探通过尾随叛军，找到了真理社的所在
t_en: In the tenth year of the Fictitious History, {TEXTJOIN#255}'s spy tailed the rebels and uncovered the location of the Truth Society

t_ch: 两军主力将在绘世学院中庭展开了规模最大的冲突
t_en: The main forces of both armies clashed in the largest conflict yet at the Academy Atrium of Graphia Academy

t_ch: 此次战役，虚构史称「覆世沧浪图战役」
t_en: In Fictitious History, this is called the "The Battle of Worldbreaker Waves."

t_ch: 禀报主公，诓二率领叛逃的尘灵就是在这浪花前消失的。
t_en: Report to my liege. Fibbs and the defecting wispae vanished right here, in front of these waves.

t_ch: 不知真理社如何藏匿其中，望主公明察。
t_en: I have no idea how the Truth Society hides in there. I hope you can get to the bottom of this, my liege.

t_ch: 真理，从来都不应该藏起来。
t_en: Truth should never be hidden away.

t_ch: 哼，有趣，加十分。真理不需要藏匿，需要被看见、践行、以及捍卫。
t_en: Hmph, interesting. Ten points to you. Truth should never be hidden away, but should be witnessed, practiced, and defended.

t_ch: 那位老师的话…会在这洗澡！
t_en: That teacher... would take a bath here!

t_ch: 诶——？！那是正常人类吗？
t_en: Huh—!? Is that something normal people can do?

t_ch: 哼，有趣，但扣十分。洗澡不过是表象，你应该说我会在这*思考*！
t_en: Hmph, interesting, but ten from you. Bathing is merely superficial, so you should say I would engage in *thinking* here!

t_ch: 主公请小心，有什么要出现了！
t_en: My liege, watch out! Something's coming!

t_ch: 如果是在正常情况下，你熟悉的那位老师，恐怕会是一位颇具威严的人物，但……
t_en: Under normal circumstances, that teacher you're familiar with would probably be quite the imposing figure, but...

t_ch: 可惜他在浴缸里。
t_en: Too bad he's in the bathtub.

t_ch: 然而，你真的有他在浴缸里泡澡的记忆吗？
t_en: But do you really have a memory of him soaking in the bathtub?

t_ch: 当然了，我在很多地方见过。
t_en: Of course! I've seen it in plenty of places.

t_ch: 角色PV，光锥，网络歌曲…或者是二相乐园不堪入目的漫画…？
t_en: Character trailers, Light Cones, internet songs... or an unpleasant comic from Planarcadia...?

t_ch: 什么意思，你是在质疑我吗？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean? Are you questioning me?

t_ch: 不敢不敢…您和旁白吵架也没有什么好处啊。
t_en: I wouldn't dare... There's no point in picking a fight with the Narrator, you know.

t_ch: 他现在也很威严。
t_en: He's pretty imposing right now.

t_ch: 很难想象一个什么样的人会在泡澡时坚持宝相威严。
t_en: It's hard to imagine what kind of person would insist on imposing presence while bathing.

t_ch: 我是真理社的指导老师，拉帝奥教授。
t_en: I'm Professor Ratio, faculty advisor for the Truth Society.

t_ch: 你们在这里叽叽喳喳的，打扰到我思考了。首先，你们得学会什么是安静。
t_en: All this chit-chat is interrupting my thinking. First lesson: learn what silence means.

t_ch: 拉帝奥教授，赶紧出兵迎战吧，现在是我们兵力更占优势！
t_en: Professor Ratio, we need to engage them now while we still have the upper hand!

t_ch: 闭嘴，你扣一百分。
t_en: Shush! That will be <unbreak>100</unbreak> points from you.

t_ch: 满脑袋只想着要用刀枪棍棒来证明谁对谁错，你们全都是原始人吗？
t_en: Is violence the only way you know how to settle things? What are you, a bunch of cavemen?

t_ch: 有那闲工夫，不如和我一起在这名作中沐浴，将更多的时间花在思考上。虚构历史，统一天下…连思考的污垢都算不上。
t_en: Rather than waste time on that, why not join me in bathing in this masterpiece and devote more time to thinking? The Fictitious History, the way to unify the world... They're not even the dirt of my thoughts.

t_ch: 真理是越辩越明的，来吧！
t_en: Truth shines brightest in debate. Come on!

t_ch: 你是打算和我辩论吗？对话太长，饶了我吧……
t_en: Are you trying to start a debate with me? That'll take forever. Give me a break...

t_ch: 什么？您邀请我一起沐浴？
t_en: What? You're inviting me to bathe with you?

t_ch: 你这个…你…我，我说的是这个意思吗？我有被蠢到了。
t_en: You! You... Is... Is that what I meant? It's astonishingly dumb.

t_ch: …我改主意了。现在，我会以得体的方式结束我认为愚蠢的对话——
t_en: ...I've changed my mind. Now, I'll end this conversation, which I find utterly foolish, in a dignified manner—

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，开战吧，赶紧的。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's get it over with.

t_ch: 全军听令，做好战斗准备！
t_en: All units, on my mark! Prepare for battle!

t_ch: 无需多言！杀！杀！杀！
t_en: Enough talk! Kill! Kill! Kill!

t_ch: 构史十年，「覆世沧浪图战役」最终以真理社的战败告终
t_en: In the tenth year of the Fictitious History, "The Battle of Worldbreaker Waves" came to a close with the Truth Society's crushing defeat

t_ch: {NICKNAME}以{TEXTJOIN#255}为元点，完成了绘世学院前所未有的伟业
t_en: With {TEXTJOIN#255} as the starting point, {NICKNAME} accomplished an unprecedented feat in Graphia Academy's history

t_ch: …终于结束了？现在，我要去沐浴了，再见。
t_en: ...Is it finally over? Well, I'm off to take a shower. Bye.

t_ch: 你这不中用的家伙，我要把你也抹除了！
t_en: You useless fool. I'll erase you too!

t_ch: 慢着。在您去享受温泉之前，教授能否为后人留下一句话？
t_en: Wait. Before you go enjoy the hot spring, Professor, could you leave some words of wisdom for posterity?

t_ch: 「去沐浴吧！」
t_en: "Go take a bath!"

t_ch: 如果所有人都在享受洗浴，那就等于所有人衣不蔽体。而不穿衣服、不着甲胄之人是无法踏上战场的……
t_en: If everyone's enjoying a bath, then everyone's without clothes. And those without clothes or armor cannot step onto the battlefield...

t_ch: 早这么做，没有战争的和平世界不就自动完成了吗？
t_en: If we'd done this from the start, wouldn't a peaceful world without war have been achieved automatically?

t_ch: 你还真是天才？竟有几分道理！
t_en: Wait, you're actually a genius? That... kinda makes sense!

t_ch: 不对，还有更加值得关注的事——真珠•智多星你回来了？！
t_en: No, there's something way more important here. Pearl the Wise... you're back!?

t_ch: 真珠•智多星你回来了？！
t_en: Pearl the Wise, you're back!?

t_ch: 这不可能，我已经将真珠•智多星从虚构历史中抹除了，你…不可能出现在这里！
t_en: Impossible! I've already erased Pearl the Wise from the Fictitious History, so you... you can't be here!

t_ch: 不对。你是…真正的真珠？
t_en: Wait. You're... the real Pearl?

t_ch: 在你的设定中，那位「真珠•智多星」是我的学术型人偶，她也忠实地将见闻上传到了我这里——所以，我对这里发生了什么也一清二楚。
t_en: In your setup, that "Pearl the Wise" is my academic puppet, and she's been faithfully uploading all her findings to me, so I'm crystal clear on everything that's happened here.

t_ch: 她突破了虚构史的知识边界，独立推理出了你的真实身份——
t_en: She broke through the knowledge boundaries of Fictitious History and deduced your true identity all on her own—

t_ch: 一位试图将「乱世」的概念悄悄刻印进不朽名作的虚构史学家，没错吧？
t_en: A History Fictionologist trying to sneak the concept of the "Age of Chaos" into an immortal masterpiece, right?

t_ch: …不错。
t_en: ...That's right.

t_ch: 历史真的能被它更改？
t_en: Can it really rewrite history?

t_ch: 我们的对历史的认知与理解，大多来自流传至今的历史文物。倘若能将「虚构历史」藏进名作之中，它将借助名作重塑人们对历史认知。
t_en: Most of what we know and understand about history comes from historical artifacts that have survived to this day. If we were to hide the "Fictitious History" within a masterpiece, it would reforge people's cognition of history.

t_ch: 这是违反二相乐园法律的行为，你以为没有人发现你的小心思吗？
t_en: That's a violation of Planarcadia law. You think nobody's caught on to your little scheme?

t_ch: …我煽动战争，纵横捭阖，终究是败于{NICKNAME}手中，没能完成「乱世」。
t_en: ...I stoked the flames of war, weaving schemes and alliances, yet in the end I fell to {NICKNAME}'s hand, unable to realize my "Age of Chaos."

t_ch: 只怪你们害怕我，害怕我的野史！
t_en: You only have yourselves to blame for fearing me, fearing my apocryphal history!

t_ch: 你错了。
t_en: You're wrong.

t_ch: 其实我挺喜欢你的野史，它足够荒诞不经，不拘泥于正论…我喜欢它的「不真实」。
t_en: Actually, I quite like your apocryphal histories. They're absurd enough, unbound by orthodox narratives... I appreciate their "unreality."

t_ch: 但是，我无法认同这种以假乱真、偷梁换柱的行为——这无疑是在否定野史的魅力！
t_en: But I can't condone this kind of fakery and switcheroo nonsense. It completely undermines the charm of apocryphal histories!

t_ch: 诓二，你看清了吗？你才是那个害怕野史的人！
t_en: Fibbs, do you see it now? You're the one who's afraid of apocryphal histories!

t_ch: 你会得到一名不入流的虚构史学家应得的惩罚。
t_en: You'll get exactly what a shoddy History Fictionologist deserves.

t_ch: 而你，{NICKNAME}，你会得到首席执行官的感谢。此后，「覆世沧浪图」会被完全修复，古老颜料们会回到画中，它们也会感谢你带来的和平。
t_en: As for you, {NICKNAME}, you'll have the CEO's gratitude. After that, the Worldbreaker Waves will be completely reinstated, the ancient pigments will return to the painting, and they'll thank you for the peace you've brought them.

t_ch: ——谢谢你，统一天下的主公。
t_en: —Thank you, my liege. You're the unifier of the world.

t_ch: 构史十年，乱世终结，{NICKNAME}完成了天下统一
t_en: In the tenth year of the Fictitious History, the Age of Chaos came to an end. {NICKNAME} unified the world.

t_ch: 虚构史称「绘世学院偃武」
t_en: It is known in the Fictitious History as the "Armistice of Graphia Academy"

t_ch: <size=36>- 终 -</size>
t_en: <size=36>—The End—</size>

t_ch: 我自诩对绘世的画作有过不少研究…但每次看到它，还是像初见它时一样震撼。
t_en: I pride myself on having studied Graphia's artwork quite extensively... but every time I see it, I'm just as awestruck as I was the first time.

t_ch: …我不会在这里久留，你还有什么想问的吗？
t_en: ...I won't be sticking around for long, so is there anything else you want to ask me?

t_ch: 虚构的英豪们怎么样了？
t_en: How are the fictional heroes doing?

t_ch: 他们只是虚构史学家借用你的记忆创作的虚构形象，已经不复存在了。
t_en: They were just fictional constructs created by the History Fictionologists using your memories. They no longer exist.

t_ch: …尽管他们不会流向正史之中，但那都是你独一无二的私人历史。
t_en: ...Even if they won't make it into the history books, they're all part of your own unique, personal history.

t_ch: 如果你想念他们了，你应该去拜访那些真实的朋友，他们应该也很想你。
t_en: If you miss them, you should go visit those real friends of yours. I'm sure they miss you, too.

t_ch: 「说书人」诓二怎么还在这里？
t_en: Why is Fibbs the Storyteller still here?

t_ch: 二相乐园会有专门的法律惩罚它。
t_en: Planarcadia has specific laws to punish it.

t_ch: 不过鉴于它大多的犯罪行为已经被你阻止了…所以，不如让它在这里做些义工——
t_en: But seeing as how you've already stopped most of its criminal activities... why don't you let it do some volunteer work here—

t_ch: 至少，它讲的故事还是挺有意思的。
t_en: At least the story it tells is pretty intriguing.

t_ch: 所以整件事是怎么回事？
t_en: So what's the true story?

t_ch: 虚构史学家是一群很会钻空子的人，他们会将自己伪装成不同身份的不同人，在历史的阴影中抢夺历史的解释权……
t_en: History Fictionologists are a bunch of slippery operators who disguise themselves as different people with different identities, lurking in the shadows of history to seize control of how it's told...

t_ch: 那位诓二，曾经是名人类，算是劣迹斑斑——他曾篡改绘世学院的校史，将这里变成了「私立构史高等专门学校」，自称是初代校长。
t_en: That Fibbs was once human, and his rap sheet was... extensive. He rewrote Graphia Academy's history, turning it into the "Private Fictitious History Higher Institute" and naming himself the founding dean.

t_ch: …想要对「覆世沧浪图」进行改编并不容易，但在幻月游戏期间，谒者们拥有塑造幻造艺术的潜力——恐怕这也是你被利用的原因。
t_en: ...It's no easy feat to modify "Worldbreaker Waves," but during the Phantasmoon Games, Supplicants have the potential to shape imagenate art, which is probably why you were used.

t_ch: 我没有什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: …虽然只是道听途说，我对你行兵布阵的战术还是很感兴趣的。
t_en: ...Though I've only heard about it through the grapevine, I'm quite interested in your tactical prowess on the battlefield.

t_ch: 如果你也有这样的兴致，不妨回到大本营去看看，说不定，还会有新的历史故事需要你。
t_en: If you're up for it, why not head back to base camp and take a look? There might be new historical stories waiting for you.

t_ch: 那么，我就告辞了。
t_en: Mm, I'll take my leave.

t_ch: 主公，你终于回来了！{TEXTJOIN#255}一统天下之后，虚构历史上又发生大事了！
t_en: My liege, you're finally back! Something big just happened in Fictitious History after {TEXTJOIN#255} unified the world!

t_ch: 你不是被治安局抓走了吗？
t_en: Wait, didn't the Security Bureau haul you off?

t_ch: 我实际上一事无成，无论是好事，还是坏事。真珠女士让我从轻发落——
t_en: I haven't actually accomplished anything, neither good nor bad. Madam Pearl let me off easy—

t_ch: 希望我能以「说书人」的身份在绘世学院里做做义工，多讲故事，讲好故事。
t_en: She hopes I can volunteer at Graphia Academy as a "Storyteller," to tell more stories, good ones.

t_ch: 不会又是新的虚构历史吧？
t_en: Not another one from the Fictitious History, right?

t_ch: 你放心，我准备的是纯纯的野史，它不会取代正史！
t_en: Don't worry, What I'm cooking up is purely apocryphal histories. It's not gonna replace the official records!

t_ch: 毕竟我得给您编撰一套历史背景，你指挥尘灵军队时才会有信念感嘛。
t_en: After all, I need to cook up a whole backstory for you so you'll feel like a proper commander when you're leading those wispae troops.

t_ch: 主公您放心，这次的构史是你没听过的全新版本！且听我慢慢道来——
t_en: My liege, rest assured. This Fictitious History is a brand-new version you've never heard before! Allow me to regale you with the tale—

t_ch: 构史百年，「绘世学院偃武」带来的太平盛世，被从天而降的飞船打破
t_en: A century after its founding, the peace brought by the "Armistice of Graphia Academy" was shattered by a ship that fell from the sky

t_ch: 这是由盛转衰的历史节点，虚构史称「界外人渡航」
t_en: This marked the turning point from prosperity to decline, known as "the sail from beyond" in the Fictitious History

t_ch: 嚯，这里就是绘世学院吗？绘世的画作在哪里？阿兰，别磨磨蹭蹭，快跟上来！
t_en: Whoa, so this is Graphia Academy? Where's the Graphia artwork? Arlan, quit dragging your feet and keep up!

t_ch: 主、主公，乱闯敌阵实在是太危险了！请等等我……
t_en: M—My liege! Charging straight into enemy formations is way too dangerous! Please wait for me...

t_ch: 这构史有点太构史了。
t_en: This Fictitious History is way too fictitious.

t_ch: 内乱已经平定了，我总得给您找个相称的对手吧，这次是外星魔王入侵。
t_en: The civil war's been put to rest, so I figured I should find you a worthy opponent. This time, it's an invasion by an alien Demonlord.

t_ch: 乱世之后是外星魔王来袭是吧？
t_en: So after the Age of Chaos, we get invaded by an alien Demonlord? Seriously?

t_ch: 没错，您意识到了吗？虚构历史就是利用了历史的「发展性」钻孔子。
t_en: Exactly! You've noticed it, haven't you? Fictitious History exploits the very "malleability" of history itself.

t_ch: 哦~刚下船就碰见一个适合拿来测试模拟宇宙的对手。魔王手下•阿兰，准备出阵！
t_en: Oh~ Just stepped off the ship and already found the perfect opponent to test out the Simulated Universe! Demonlord's Aide Arlan, ready for battle!

t_ch: 诶…微臣遵命。
t_en: Ah... Yes, my liege.

t_ch: 看来，乱世还没有结束…
t_en: Looks like the Age of Chaos isn't over yet...

t_ch: 主公，我们也快快做好出征的准备吧！
t_en: My liege, let's get ready to set out right away!

t_ch: 浪里浮来深空船，魔王天降卷狂澜。全军将士任您差遣，主公您准备好了吗？
t_en: From the deep water emerge spaceships, and the Demonlord summons raging waves. All troops await your command, my liege. Are you ready?

t_ch: 传令下去，诸将至大本营集合。
t_en: Send word to all. Everyone's to gather at the base camp.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}主公有令。击鼓升帐，所有士兵以上的将领，速来集合！
t_en: {NICKNAME} has issued a command. Sound the drums and convene the council. All officers ranked soldier and above, assemble immediately!

t_ch: 现在的「界外人渡航」是…
t_en: The sail from beyond here is...

t_ch: 嗯，您放心，这都是咱的「话本故事」不会影响现实世界的正史。
t_en: Don't worry, this is all part of my "made-up story." It won't affect the actual history of the real world.

t_ch: 那这天外魔王和魔王手下是？
t_en: So what about this Demonlord From Beyond and the Demonlord's Aides?

t_ch: 是结合主公记忆虚构的刻板印象。
t_en: It's a stereotypical impression crafted from your memories.

t_ch: 感觉战役永远都不会结束呢？
t_en: Does it feel like this battle's never gonna end?

t_ch: 这是…无尽模式。
t_en: This is... Infinite Mode.

t_ch: 魔王毕竟是天外的入侵者，与他们交战必定是旷日持久。
t_en: After all, the Demonlord is an invader from beyond the sky. Any battle against them is bound to be a long and drawn-out affair.

t_ch: 再等等吧。
t_en: Let's wait a bit.

t_ch: 无妨。主公您想听虚构史评书的时候，就来找我吧。
t_en: No worries. Whenever you feel like listening to some Fictitious History storytelling, my liege, just come find me.

t_ch: …主公，您才是真正的绘世学院无双啊！
t_en: ...My liege, you're the true unrivaled genius of Graphia Academy!

t_ch: 其实按照我的设计，「魔王」入侵超级绘世学院，多座超级教学楼会相继沦陷，最后只剩一间超级教室，尘灵再展开最终决战！
t_en: Actually, according to my design, the Demonlord invades Super Graphia Academy, and one after another, the Super Teaching Buildings fall, until only one Super Classroom remains, where the wispae launch their final battle!

t_ch: 但是您也太能打了…我真是没招了，您赢了。
t_en: But wow, you're way too strong... I'm totally out of tricks here. You win.

t_ch: <size=28>我宣布「魔王」失败！</size>
t_en: <size=28>I hereby declare "Demonlord" defeated!</size>

t_ch: 超级绘世学院的超级胜利。
t_en: A super victory for Super Graphia Academy!

t_ch: 期待您后续创作，加油…
t_en: Looking forward to your next creation. Keep it up!

t_ch: 鉴于您打断了我的历史创作，我也没有想好后面怎么发展，「界外人渡航」会锁定进度。
t_en: Since you interrupted my historical masterpiece, and I haven't figured out how to continue it yet, progress on "the sail from beyond" will be locked.

t_ch: 您愿意接着挑战，就接着挑战，我也该想想之后要怎么编了……
t_en: You wanna continue the challenge? Be my guest. I need to figure out what tall tale to spin next...

t_ch: 敌军已至阵前！
t_en: Enemy forces incoming!

t_ch: 讨取敌将首级！
t_en: Off with their heads!

t_ch: 斗士阵——前突！
t_en: Fighter formation! Charge forward!

t_ch: 弓手队——火力掩护！
t_en: Archer squad! Cover them!

t_ch: 一起建功立业吧！
t_en: Let's achieve greatness together!

t_ch: 今日便是扬名之时！
t_en: Today's the day we shine!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来得正好。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, perfect timing.

t_ch: 主公，准备好布阵迎敌了吗？
t_en: My liege, are you ready to deploy your formation and face the enemy?

t_ch: 当然，全军出击！
t_en: Of course, full force ahead!

t_ch: 不，暂且退避。
t_en: No, let's fall back for now.

t_ch: 经过一番紧张刺激的测试，你正式成为了差分宇宙的头号贵宾。
t_en: After a bout of intense, thrilling tests, you have officially become the most esteemed guest of the Divergent Universe.

t_ch: 自翁法罗斯返回后的某天，你在晖长石号上撞见了这样一幕……
t_en: One day after returning from Amphoreus, you stumble upon this scene on the Radiant Feldspar...

t_ch: …系统运转顺利。结论：我提供的算力提升了模拟宇宙<unbreak>3.7%</unbreak>的响应速度。
t_en: ...systems running smoothly. Conclusion: My computational power has improved the Simulated Universe's response speed by <unbreak>3.7%</unbreak>.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你来的正好。我对这次合作的乐观度上升了<unbreak>7.3%</unbreak>。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, your timing is impeccable. My optimism about this collaboration just increased by <unbreak>7.3%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 真珠也在啊。
t_en: Pearl's here too.

t_ch: 同为螺丝星的智械同胞，我们之间有许多共通语言。
t_en: As fellow Intellitron siblings from Planet Screwllum, we've got a lot in common to talk about.

t_ch: 公司终于要对模拟宇宙下手了吗？
t_en: Is the IPC finally making a move on the Simulated Universe?

t_ch: 更正：我提出的合作邀请谨代表个人而非公司。
t_en: Correction: My offer to work together is on my own behalf, not the IPC's.

t_ch: 就在前不久，我与真珠女士达成了一项协定：仅在模拟宇宙的下个课题周期，将其列入协作者名单。她会提供部分算力支持。
t_en: Not too long ago, I came to an agreement with Madam Pearl: for the next research cycle in the Simulated Universe, I'll add her to the list of collaborators. In return, she'll provide some computational support.

t_ch: 我们将<color=#dbc291ff>「愿力」</color>作为关键变量加入了新版本的模拟宇宙，同时提高了「欢愉」命途的计算权重。
t_en: We've added <color=#dbc291ff>Wishpower</color> as a key variable to the new version of the Simulated Universe, while also increasing the calculation weight for the Path of Elation.

t_ch: 考虑到正在举办的「幻月游戏」为欢愉星神垂迹，这次课题更新也会采用类似形式呈现。备注：融合了现代网络的集体印象，不保证准确性。
t_en: Considering that the ongoing Phantasmoon Games are a manifestation of the Aeon of Elation, this curriculum update will be presented in a similar fashion. Note: It incorporates collective impressions from modern online culture, so accuracy is not guaranteed.

t_ch: 在模拟宇宙也要打幻月游戏吗？
t_en: Do we seriously have to play Phantasmoon Games in the Simulated Universe too?

t_ch: 更正：本次课题仅在表现形式上使用了幻月游戏相关元素，并不具备实际效力。
t_en: Correction: This project only uses elements related to Phantasmoon Games for presentation purposes and does not possess any actual efficacy.

t_ch: 赢了能见到阿哈吗？
t_en: If I win, do I get to meet Aha?

t_ch: 由于参考资料有限，暂不打算加入该功能。
t_en: Due to limited reference materials, we're not planning to add this feature for now.

t_ch: 问过黑塔的意见吗？
t_en: Did you ask Herta what she thinks?

t_ch: 黑塔女士对该提案没有异议。「铁墓」一战后，她也在积极寻找预防「毁灭」的有效方案，譬如推进虚数脉冲实用化。该课题或将提供帮助。
t_en: Madam Herta had no objections to the proposal. After the battle with Irontomb, she's been actively searching for effective countermeasures against the Destruction, like advancing the practical application of Imaginary Pulse technology. This project could prove helpful.

t_ch: 「愿力」究竟如何形成，又是如何对游戏产生影响，其中原理仍未被人所知。结论：是极好的课题选材。
t_en: How exactly Wishpower forms and influences the game remains a mystery. Conclusion: An excellent choice for a research topic.

t_ch: 另外，对于二相乐园入画时代之前的「传统」幻月游戏，公司留下的资料并不完善。对愿力展开研究，也有助于我行使职权。
t_en: Besides, the IPC's records on the "traditional" Phantasmoon Games from before Planarcadia's Canvas Age are pretty spotty. Researching Wishpower will also help me carry out my duties more effectively.

t_ch: 事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}不妨亲自体验一番。
t_en: No time like the present. Why don't you give it a try yourself, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 系统无颠覆性异常。看来这套以「愿力」为基础的架构，确实能和以命途为基底的架构完美耦合。
t_en: No systemic aberrations detected. Looks like this framework based on Wishpower can indeed couple perfectly with a Path-rooted architecture.

t_ch: 猜测：如果将有机生命的情感比作潮汐，那么「愿力」就是溅起的浪花。结论：谒者获取愿力与智慧生命对星神的信仰有相通之处。
t_en: Hypothesis: If the emotions of organic life are likened to tides, then Wishpower is the spray that splashes up. Conclusion: A Supplicant's acquisition of Wishpower shares similarities with sentient life's faith in Aeons.

t_ch: 既然螺丝咕姆先生已经验收完毕，我也是时候返回珠星大厦了。希望日后我们能多多展开交流。
t_en: Now that Mr. Screwllum has finished the inspection, it's time for me to head back to Pearluxe Tower. I hope we can stay in touch and collaborate more in the future.

t_ch: 真珠也对你展开了信用点攻势吗？
t_en: Did Pearl launch a credit offensive on you too?

t_ch: 否定。天才不缺少财富，真珠小姐也知晓自己需拿出更多诚意。
t_en: Negative. A genius doesn't lack wealth, and Miss Pearl knows she needs to show more sincerity.

t_ch: 刚才的结论意味着什么？
t_en: What does that conclusion mean?

t_ch: 具体结论仍需完善，但我可以提供一个方向：拥有命途能量之人，未必都是命途行者。
t_en: The specifics still need to be refined, but I can point you in a direction: Those who possess Path Energy aren't necessarily Pathstriders.

t_ch: 可以肯定的是，对于这场幻月游戏，真珠小姐亦有自己所求之物。但至少在课题层面上，她是一位可靠的合作者。
t_en: One thing is affirmative. Miss Pearl has her own agenda when it comes to these Phantasmoon Games. But at least on a professional level, she's a reliable partner to work with.

t_ch: 之后也请你如常来测试，我还有一些猜想有待验证。
t_en: Keep coming back for tests as usual. I've still got some conjectures I need to verify.

t_ch: 除去幻月游戏外，「欢愉」的仪式也存在于宇宙各处，例如翁瓦克的魔王讨伐，亦或是双面星的永恒竞走……
t_en: Beyond the Phantasmoon Games, ceremonies of Elation exist throughout the universe, like the Devil Hunt on Vonwacq, or the Eternal Race on Twin-Sided Planet...

t_ch: 这些仪式没有统一的规则和奖励，却不时在寰宇间掀起命途的波澜。猜测：它们是对「欢愉」边界的探索。
t_en: These ceremonies follow no unified rules and offer no set rewards, yet they constantly stir up ripples across the Paths throughout the universe. Hypothesis: They're explorations of the boundaries of Elation.

t_ch: 走吧，假身份信息已经录入，你去验证一下就能通过。
t_en: Your fake ID info is ready, just go to the console like you own it.

t_ch: 使用「终结技」解决战斗吧！
t_en: Use your Ultimate to put an end to the fight!

t_ch: 前方是界域定锚
t_en: There's a Space Anchor up ahead.

t_ch: 打开宝箱看看吧
t_en: Open the chest and see what's inside.

t_ch: 使用「战技」可以保护被敌方集火的队友哦
t_en: Use your Skill to protect your teammate targeted by the enemy.

t_ch: 轮到我了么？
t_en: My turn now?

t_ch: 我的攻击可以对属性弱点为风的敌方十分有效
t_en: My attacks are quite effective against enemies whose Weakness is Wind.

t_ch: 点击施放「普通攻击」
t_en: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to use Basic ATK.

t_ch: 前方有个物件，尝试使用攻击技能破坏它吧！
t_en: There's an object up ahead. Let's try using an attack to break it.

t_ch: 能量满了，快施放终结技
t_en: Energy's full! Quick, use your Ultimate.

t_ch: 将敌方的「韧性」削减殆尽，可以给我充能
t_en: Depleting the enemy's Toughness can help me charge.

t_ch: 攻击敌方目标可进入战斗
t_en: Attack the target enemy to enter combat.

t_ch: 点击施放更强力的「战技」，攻击多个敌方目标
t_en: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to unleash a more powerful Skill and attack multiple enemies.

t_ch: 根据敌方弱点使用对应属性的攻击
t_en: Use an attack corresponding to the enemy's Weakness.

t_ch: 接下来看我的表演吧
t_en: Now let me show you how it's done.

t_ch: 轮到我了么？
t_en: My turn now?

t_ch: 根据敌方弱点使用对应属性的攻击
t_en: Use an attack corresponding to the enemy's Weakness.

t_ch: 使用「终结技」不受回合限制
t_en: Ultimate can be cast even when it's not your turn.

t_ch: 根据敌方弱点使用对应属性的攻击
t_en: Use an attack corresponding to the enemy's Weakness.
